The Founder

Brazilian-born.
Charleston-rooted.
Globally minded.

I am Andrea Villas-Boas Finkelstein — Executive Director, trilingual interpreter, marketing strategist, and the woman behind Vivazia Living. My journey began in the vibrant culture of Brazil, wound through two decades of professional leadership, and found its home here in Charleston, SC.

"Vivazia represents more than expertise — it is a testament to a shared dream of living fully, beautifully, and intentionally."

With over 20 years spanning executive leadership, multilingual communications, HR, operations, and marketing, I bring a rare breadth of expertise to every engagement. Whether working with corporate teams, individual women in transition, or business owners ready to grow — I show up with strategy, warmth, and a deeply Brazilian sense of abundance.

Executive Director Trilingual Brazilian-born Charleston, SC Marketing Expert Interpreter Women's Empowerment
Community Women who lift each other
Heart What matters most
What I Offer

Services Designed
to Elevate Your World

Every service I offer is rooted in the same belief that built this brand — that every space, every chapter, every life holds infinite potential. I bring two decades of lived expertise to the table, with strategy, warmth, and genuine care.

01
Corporate Training & Strategic Communications

Executive coaching, leadership development, and strategic communications training for organizations ready to elevate their people and their performance. From managerial skills to cross-cultural communication — customized programs built around your team's real needs.

Custom engagement
02
Interior Design & Styling

From full home construction and remodeling to interior decorating and space styling — tailor-made solutions that bring your vision to life.

Custom quote
03
Interpretation & Translation

Professional consecutive and simultaneous interpretation in English and Brazilian Portuguese. Corporate conferences, business meetings, and live events.

Custom engagement
04
Women's Empowerment Coaching

Mindset, leadership, and reinvention coaching for women navigating major life transitions and building a life entirely on their own terms.

From $150 / session
05
Life Organization & Lifestyle Consulting

Practical systems, organizational tools, and lifestyle strategies for the woman who wants her life to run as beautifully as it looks — from paperwork and administrative systems to time management and intentional daily routines.

From $150 / session
06
Digital Products

Beautifully designed printable planners, travel guides, and empowerment templates for the modern woman who lives with intention.

From $25 · Instant download
07
Brand & Digital Presence

Website design and development, brand identity, Pinterest strategy, social media setup, and digital marketing consulting for entrepreneurs and small businesses ready to build their online presence.

From $1,500

Every path leads
somewhere beautiful.

"I believe in the power of every person to transform their life, their work, and their world. Vivazia Living exists to walk that path with you."

Founded on the belief that every life holds infinite possibility, Vivazia Living brings together expertise, warmth, and a deeply Brazilian sense of abundance — in service of your growth.
